00027 #ifndef JELATINE_CONSTANTPOOL_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_CONSTANTPOOL_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 #include "classfile.h"
00033 #include "field.h"
00034 #include "util.h"
00035 
00036 // Forward declarations
00037 
00038 struct class_t;
00039 struct field_t;
00040 struct static_field_t;
00041 struct method_t;
00042 
00043 /******************************************************************************
00044  * Constant pool type definitions                                             *
00045  ******************************************************************************/
00046 
00051 struct fieldref_t {
00052     uint16_t class_index; 
00053     uint16_t name_and_type_index; 
00054 };
00055 
00057 typedef struct fieldref_t fieldref_t;
00058 
00061 struct name_and_type_t {
00062     uint16_t name_index; 
00063     uint16_t descriptor_index; 
00064 };
00065 
00067 typedef struct name_and_type_t name_and_type_t;
00068 
00074 struct const_pool_t {
00075     uint16_t entries; 
00076     uint8_t *tags; 
00077     jword_t data[]; 
00078 };
00079 
00081 typedef struct const_pool_t const_pool_t;
00082 
00083 /******************************************************************************
00084  * Constant pool interface                                                    *
00085  ******************************************************************************/
00086 
00087 extern const_pool_t *cp_create(struct class_t *, class_file_t *);
00088 extern const_pool_t *cp_create_dummy( void );
00089 extern const_pool_type_t cp_get_tag(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00090 extern void cp_set_tag_and_data(const_pool_t *, uint16_t, uint8_t, void *);
00091 extern char *cp_get_class_name(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00092 extern char *cp_get_string(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00093 extern uintptr_t cp_get_ref(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00094 extern int32_t cp_get_integer(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00095 extern int64_t cp_get_long(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00096 extern char *cp_get_name_and_type_name(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00097 extern char *cp_get_name_and_type_type(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00098 extern uint16_t cp_get_fieldref_class(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00099 extern char *cp_get_fieldref_name(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00100 extern char *cp_get_fieldref_type(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00101 extern uint16_t cp_get_methodref_class(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00102 extern char *cp_get_methodref_name(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00103 extern char *cp_get_methodref_descriptor(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00104 extern uint16_t cp_get_interfacemethodref_class(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00105 extern char *cp_get_interfacemethodref_name(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00106 extern char *cp_get_interfacemethodref_descriptor(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00107 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00108 extern float cp_get_float(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00109 extern double cp_get_double(const_pool_t *, uint16_t);
00110 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00111 #ifdef JEL_PRINT
00112 extern void cp_print(const_pool_t *);
00113 #endif // JEL_PRINT
00114 
00115 /******************************************************************************
00116  * Inlined functions for accessing the constant pool data section             *
00117  ******************************************************************************/
00118 
00124 static inline void cp_data_set_ptr(jword_t *data, size_t i, void *ptr)
00125 {
00126     *((void **) (data + i)) = ptr;
00127 } // cp_data_set_ptr()
00128 
00134 static inline void *cp_data_get_ptr(const jword_t *data, size_t i)
00135 {
00136     return *((void **) (data + i));
00137 } // cp_data_get_ptr()
00138 
00144 static inline void cp_data_set_uintptr(jword_t *data, size_t i, uintptr_t ptr)
00145 {
00146     *((uintptr_t *) (data + i)) = ptr;
00147 } // cp_data_set_uintptr()
00148 
00154 static inline uintptr_t cp_data_get_uintptr(const jword_t *data, size_t i)
00155 {
00156     return *((const uintptr_t *) (data + i));
00157 } // cp_data_get_uintptr()
00158 
00164 static inline void cp_data_set_uint16(jword_t *data, size_t i, uint16_t v)
00165 {
00166     *((uint16_t *) (data + i)) = v;
00167 } // cp_data_set_uint16()
00168 
00174 static inline uint16_t cp_data_get_uint16(const jword_t *data, size_t i)
00175 {
00176     return *((const uint16_t *) (data + i));
00177 } // cp_data_get_uint16()
00178 
00184 static inline void cp_data_set_int32(jword_t *data, size_t i, int32_t v)
00185 {
00186     *((int32_t *) (data + i)) = v;
00187 } // cp_data_set_int32()
00188 
00194 static inline int32_t cp_data_get_int32(const jword_t *data, size_t i)
00195 {
00196     return *((const int32_t *) (data + i));
00197 } // cp_data_get_int32()
00198 
00204 static inline void cp_data_set_float(jword_t *data, size_t i, float v)
00205 {
00206     *((float *) (data + i)) = v;
00207 } // cp_data_set_float()
00208 
00214 static inline float cp_data_get_float(const jword_t *data, size_t i)
00215 {
00216     return *((const float *) (data + i));
00217 } // cp_data_get_float()
00218 
00224 static inline void cp_data_set_int64(jword_t *data, size_t i, int64_t v)
00225 {
00226     *((int64_t *) (data + i)) = v;
00227 } // cp_data_set_int64()
00228 
00234 static inline int64_t cp_data_get_int64(const jword_t *data, size_t i)
00235 {
00236     return *((const int64_t *) (data + i));
00237 } // cp_data_get_int64()
00238 
00244 static inline void cp_data_set_double(jword_t *data, size_t i, double v)
00245 {
00246     *((double *) (data + i)) = v;
00247 } // cp_data_set_double()
00248 
00254 static inline double cp_data_get_double(const jword_t *data, size_t i)
00255 {
00256     return *((const double *) (data + i));
00257 } // cp_data_get_double()
00258 
00264 static inline void cp_data_set_fieldref_class(jword_t *data, size_t i,
00265                                               uint16_t idx)
00266 {
00267     ((fieldref_t *) (data + i))->class_index = idx;
00268 } // cp_data_set_fieldref_class()
00269 
00275 static inline uint16_t cp_data_get_fieldref_class(const jword_t *data, size_t i)
00276 {
00277     return ((const fieldref_t *) (data + i))->class_index;
00278 } // cp_data_get_fieldref_class()
00279 
00285 static inline void cp_data_set_fieldref_name_and_type(jword_t *data, size_t i,
00286                                                       uint16_t idx)
00287 {
00288     ((fieldref_t *) (data + i))->name_and_type_index = idx;
00289 } // cp_data_set_fieldref_name_and_type()
00290 
00296 static inline uint16_t cp_data_get_fieldref_name_and_type(const jword_t *data,
00297                                                           size_t i)
00298 {
00299     return ((const fieldref_t *) (data + i))->name_and_type_index;
00300 } // cp_data_get_fieldref_name_and_type()
00301 
00307 static inline void cp_data_set_name_and_type_name(jword_t *data, size_t i,
00308                                                   uint16_t idx)
00309 {
00310     ((name_and_type_t *) (data + i))->name_index = idx;
00311 } // cp_data_set_name_and_type_name()
00312 
00318 static inline uint16_t cp_data_get_name_and_type_name(const jword_t *data,
00319                                                       size_t i)
00320 {
00321     return ((const name_and_type_t *) (data + i))->name_index;
00322 } // cp_data_get_name_and_type_name()
00323 
00329 static inline void cp_data_set_name_and_type_descriptor(jword_t *data, size_t i,
00330                                                         uint16_t idx)
00331 {
00332     ((name_and_type_t *) (data + i))->descriptor_index = idx;
00333 } // cp_data_set_name_and_type_descriptor()
00334 
00340 static inline uint16_t cp_data_get_name_and_type_descriptor(const jword_t *data,
00341                                                             size_t i)
00342 {
00343     return ((const name_and_type_t *) (data + i))->descriptor_index;
00344 } // cp_data_get_name_and_type_descriptor()
00345 
00346 /******************************************************************************
00347  * Inlined constant pool functions                                            *
00348  ******************************************************************************/
00349 
00354 static inline struct class_t *cp_get_class(const_pool_t *cp)
00355 {
00356     return (struct class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp->data, 0);
00357 } // cp_get_class()
00358 
00364 static inline struct class_t *cp_get_resolved_class(const_pool_t *cp,
00365                                                     uint16_t entry)
00366 {
00367     assert(entry < cp->entries);
00368     assert(cp_get_tag(cp, entry) == CONSTANT_Class_resolved);
00369 
00370     return (struct class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp->data, entry);
00371 } // cp_get_resolved_class()
00372 
00378 static inline struct field_t *cp_get_resolved_instance_field(const_pool_t *cp,
00379                                                              uint16_t entry)
00380 {
00381     assert(entry < cp->entries);
00382     assert(cp_get_tag(cp, entry) == CONSTANT_Fieldref_resolved);
00383 
00384     return (struct field_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp->data, entry);
00385 } // cp_get_resolved_instance_field()
00386 
00392 static inline struct field_t *cp_get_resolved_static_field(const_pool_t *cp,
00393                                                            uint16_t entry)
00394 {
00395     static_field_t *static_field;
00396 
00397     assert(entry < cp->entries);
00398     assert(cp_get_tag(cp, entry) == CONSTANT_Fieldref_resolved);
00399 
00400     static_field = (static_field_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp->data, entry);
00401 
00402     return static_field->field;
00403 } // cp_get_resolved_static_field()
00404 
00410 static inline struct method_t *cp_get_resolved_method(const_pool_t *cp,
00411                                                       uint16_t entry)
00412 {
00413     assert(entry < cp->entries);
00414     assert(cp_get_tag(cp, entry) == CONSTANT_Methodref_resolved);
00415 
00416     return (struct method_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp->data, entry);
00417 } // cp_get_resovled_method()
00418 
00424 static inline struct method_t *cp_get_resolved_interfacemethod(const_pool_t *cp,
00425                                                                uint16_t entry)
00426 {
00427     assert(entry < cp->entries);
00428     assert(cp_get_tag(cp, entry) == CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref_resolved);
00429 
00430     return (struct method_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp->data, entry);
00431 } // cp_get_resovled_interfacemethod()
00432 
00433 #endif // !JELATINE_CONSTANTPOOL_H
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:25 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
